prompt: Show all banquet halls and conference rooms where either can hold 200 people.
expected: {"is_ambiguous": false, "sql": "SELECT EventSpaces.Name \r\nFROM EventSpaces\r\nWHERE (EventSpaces.Event_Space = \"Banquet Hall\" OR EventSpaces.Event_Space = \"Conference Room\") AND EventSpaces.Capacity = 200"}
